message.content: @startuml title 票据签发 participant "web" as web #LightBlue database "供票服务" as db1 #Lavender filesystem "文件系统" as fs #Plum entity "贸易背景" as tb2 #Thistle queue "工作流" as wf3 #Orchid actor "短信服务" as sms4 #MediumPurple ' Step-by-step interactions from Web to Supply Service for data entry steps note over web : Step Details:\n\nUser Actions: \n- Click on Bill Issuance.\n- Fill in Drawer Information.\n- Enter Acceptor's Info.\n- Input Payee Data.\n- Optional Guarantor details if needed.\n- Complete bill information fields.\n- Proceed by clicking 'Next'.\n end note == Initial Steps == db1 -> db1: Request Save First Set of Data (#8) activate db1 alt Parameter Validation Successful(#9) then Create Trade Record(trade table,status=initial)(#10)\nCreate trade detail record(pre-generate IDs,bill_code)(#11)\nAdd asset records(asset status initialized at zero)(assert_table,#12)\nLink Asset ID via extension tables(issue_ext_tables). Then return generated codes back(web receives them after processing completes successfully.)else Invalid Parameters Detected During Checks End Process Early Without Saving Any Changes Made So Far Return Error Message Back To User Interface For Correction And Retry Attempt Later On If Needed Again After Fixing Issues Found Earlier Before Continuing Further Ahead With Next Stage Of Workflow Sequence Diagram Shown Here Below...endif deactivate db1 fs <-<-tb2 Upload Background Documents Related Specifically Towards Current Transaction Being Handled Right Now Within System Itself Automatically Upon Receiving Such Requests From Clientside Applications Running Remotely Elsewhere Across Network Infrastructure Connecting All Together Seamlessly Behind Scenes Unseen By Ordinary
